---
title: 'Dear Her 5/25/2020'
date: '2020-05-25T17:51:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '3435617230550812587'
blogger_filename: '/2020/05/dear-her-5252020.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Dear Her'
---

Dear Her,<div><br></div><div>Last night, I freaked out a little. There's other "me"s out there. Even Google thinks I'm Scott Rounds or that he is me. Why should I be worth driving across country for?</div><div><br></div><div>Then, what if I'm just being catfished? What if this girl isn't even who she says she is?&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>But all of that seems silly right now. There's no reason to feel she's anything but Jen.&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>She asked me to ask God about her. I open my Bible to Ephesians and it says to carefully determine what pleases the Lord... Everything comes to light.</div><div><br></div><div>So I'm asking God, to show me who she is.</div><div><br></div><div>God, show me Jen. Bring everything to light. If you're in this, I want to see it. If there's a warning, I want to see it. If there's a problem, I want to see it. If there's a green light I want to see it.&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>But more, I want to see who Jen is. Not just who she is to me, but, who she is. Show me her heart and who you are in her. How do you see her?</div><div><br></div><div>Me, sitting in a chair, waiting for revelation about who she is, isn't how God and I operate. I observe. I see. I'm a Seer. I spent time on her John's Journey page. She's the real deal, everything she says she is. And she deserves better than me... But if she'll have me, I think I could spend the rest of my life being surprised by her.</div><div><br></div><div>Had an interesting thought. I have a history of Pornography Addiction, and women sending me nude photos. Here's a woman who sent a photo with just a hint of cleavage and then resent the photo with proper coverage. Who doesn't take selfies except on rare occasion. Who promised I would never see a nude photo, even at 90. Who's got a history of not being in pictures but had given me several, and I'm beginning to cherish each one.&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>What better wife for me, than one who will blow my mind and turn me on by phone from 3,000 miles away without nudity... And one who, if she's half of what she claims to want in that department, would be more than enough to keep me guessing, interested, and playing for the rest of one of our lives?</div><div><br></div><div>Hm...</div><div><br></div><div>Selah</div><div><br></div><div>Thanks for listening,&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>Darrell, Your Him.</div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
  <a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1590425749997876-0-ea81c6d8c474.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;">
    <img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1590425749997876-0-ea81c6d8c474.png" width="400">
  </a>
</div><br></div>
